name: Parallel Noising in Neural Markov Logic Networks

description: arXiv:2607.19126v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Neural Markov Logic Networks (NMLNs) are a flexible neurosymbolic relational model. Previous work has shown that, although NMLNs achieve strong performance as generative models for small relational structures, they underperform diffusion-based generative graph models on larger structures. In this paper, we strengthen NMLNs along two main dimensi...
author: Peter Jung, Giuseppe Marra, Ondrej Kuzelka
